basic_details.job_title: NIT Trichy Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: NIT Trichy is recruiting Project Associate I for a DST-funded cutting-edge research project in advanced materials and stealth technology.

important_dates.interview_date: Will be communicated to shortlisted candidates

age_limit.age_details: I-DAPT Hub Foundation, IIT (BHU) Varanasi (DST NM-ICPS)

qualification.details: Essential: B.E/B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent with First Class. Desirable: Candidates with research aptitude and relevant experience. Selected candidates will be encouraged to register for M.S. (by Research) programme.

vacancy_details.Essential Qualification: B.E/B.Tech in Mechanical or equivalent Engineering (First Class)

post_wise_breakdown.essential_qualification: B.E/B.Tech in Mechanical or equivalent Engineering (First Class)

how_to_apply: Fill the prescribed application format (available in the advertisement).
Send the duly filled application along with all supporting documents as a single PDF file by email to [email protected].
Subject line: “Application for the Project Associate I Position – I-DAPT Hub Foundation, Technology Innovation Hub-DST, INDIA”.
important_instructions: No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Candidates must bring original certificates for verification. Mere fulfillment of criteria does not guarantee selection. The decision of the selection committee is final.

content_sections.heading: NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Associate I Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: NIT Trichy is recruiting Project Associate I for a DST-funded cutting-edge research project in advanced materials and stealth technology.

rows.national_institute_of_technology_nit_tir: Next frontier development of tailor-made sandwich polymer nanocomposites with tunable electromagnetic and structural properties, and low-radar signature for advanced stealth systems
I-DAPT Hub Foundation, IIT (BHU) Varanasi (DST NM-ICPS)

content_sections.heading: NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Associate Important Dates 2026

rows.date_time: Will be communicated to shortlisted candidates

content_sections.heading: NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Associate Vacancy Details 2026

rows.essential_qualification: B.E/B.Tech in Mechanical or equivalent Engineering (First Class)

content_sections.heading: NIT Tiruchirappalli Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Essential: B.E/B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent with First Class. Desirable: Candidates with research aptitude and relevant experience. Selected candidates will be encouraged to register for M.S. (by Research) programme.

content_sections.heading: Job Description
content_sections.text: Design experimental protocols and execute experiments. Analyze results and develop learning models. Test and validate the models. Visit laboratories and universities. Participate in lab meetings and seminars. Documentation and reporting.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Candidates
content_sections.text: No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. Candidates must bring original certificates for verification. Mere fulfillment of criteria does not guarantee selection. The decision of the selection committee is final.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIT Trichy Project Associate I post?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of application is 22 July 2026 (5:00 PM).

faq.question: Q2. What is the monthly emoluments for Project Associate I at NIT Tiruchirappalli?
faq.answer: ₹25,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What is the essential qualification required for the project?
faq.answer: B.E/B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering or equivalent with First Class.

faq.question: Q4. What is the project title at NIT Trichy under I-DAPT Hub?
faq.answer: Next frontier development of tailor-made sandwich polymer nanocomposites with tunable electromagnetic and structural properties, and low-radar signature for advanced stealth systems.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for NIT Tiruchirappalli Project Associate vacancy?
faq.answer: Send the application as a single PDF to [email protected] with the specified subject line.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age relaxation for the Project Associate position?
faq.answer: Yes, age may be relaxed for experienced/deserving candidates (upper limit 28 years).

faq.question: Q7. Will selected candidates get opportunity for higher studies?
faq.answer: Yes. Selected candidates will be encouraged to register for M.S. (by Research).

faq.question: Q8. Is the NIT Trichy Project Associate post permanent?
faq.answer: No. It is purely temporary for 12 months (extendable).

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required for NIT Tiruchirappalli application?
faq.answer: Qualifying degree certificates, mark sheets, experience certificates, etc.

faq.question: Q10. Where will the interview be conducted?
faq.answer: At NIT Tiruchirappalli (date will be communicated to shortlisted candidates).
